svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Pi Architecture" id="pi-architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1443" dy="818" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1420" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="laptop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Operator laptop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="slack" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Personal Slack workspace" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="repo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="GitHub repo<br>HagaSpa/bons8i" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pi_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#333333;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=8;" value="Raspberry Pi 5 -- single-node kubeadm cluster" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="620" width="1000" x="340" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="net_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=6;" value="Networking" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="380" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gitops_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=6;" value="GitOps control plane" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="235" width="280" x="700" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=6;" value="Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="280" x="1040" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="obs_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;dashed=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;align=left;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=6;" value="Observability" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="940" x="380" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tailscale" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Tailscale<br>(remote ssh / kubectl)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="380" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cilium" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Cilium 1.19.5<br>CNI + kube-proxy replacement (eBPF)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="400" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="argocd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ArgoCD<br>(self-managed, App of Apps)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="720" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sealedsecrets" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="sealed-secrets controller" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="720" y="106" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="localpath" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="local-path-provisioner<br>(default StorageClass)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="1060" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vmstack" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="VictoriaMetrics k8s stack<br>(vmagent / vmalert / alertmanager / grafana)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="420" x="400" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="atg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="alertmanager-to-github" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="420" x="860" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="laptop" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="tailscale" value="ssh / kubectl"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="repo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="argocd" value="Helm charts + git manifests<br>(pull-based sync)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0019" y="-18" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="729" y="315" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="argocd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="cilium" value="manages"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1" y="16" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="argocd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="sealedsecrets" value="manages"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="argocd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="localpath" value="manages"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" y="-15" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="argocd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="vmstack" value="manages"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="argocd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="atg" value="manages"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="vmstack" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="atg" value="firing alert (webhook)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="atg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="repo" value="open / close / reopen issue"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0068" y="10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1070" y="578" /> <mxPoint x="150" y="578" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="repo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="slack" value="issue event"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
